patch.value: Contract schema golden-file snapshot gate in CI
pm contracts --full JSON is the primary machine-readable surface for agents/SDK consumers; tested behaviorally but not as a whole-output snapshot, so a structural change could ship silently.
Script generates a committed contracts snapshot; CI compares and fails on diff; explicit update command regenerates; CHANGELOG entry required when snapshot changes.
